productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Grey Night suits
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsLight grey pyjama top with round neck, short puffed sleeves, yoke with checked piping and gathers in the middle, vents at the hem and appliqué d butterfly design on the right hemMatching checked full-length pyjama bottoms in flower pink, purple, and olive, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
